changes: Moved 404 embedded SOP/content panes out of JavaScript into assets/panes/*.html.
Added lazy pane loader: each SOP file is fetched only when the user opens it.
Added external search index assets/sugo-pane-index.json; it is loaded before AI/SOP matching instead of being embedded in startup JavaScript.
Patched showPane/preparePaneElement to work asynchronously with external pane files.

tests.staticFetchSmokeTest: passed for index.html, sugo-app.js, one pane file, and sugo-pane-index.json
